automaticFlow.role: Claude may orchestrate research, sequence tasks, and convert goals into complete task files.
Codex may edit approved repo files, including workflow agent files, and must run repo-native verification.
Codex runs declared test commands and records failures without changing trading authority.
GPT reviews safety, strategy logic, tests, and missing evidence as advisory feedback.
Trading Authority is the final deterministic backend decision layer for paper state and risk gates.
The local pipeline writes task status, logs, and deployment gate evidence.

display.role: Antigravity may only display verified backend truth.

globalBlocks: No agent can bypass risk gates.
No agent can enable live trading.
No agent can place broker orders.
